name: Grace Adeyemi
description: A teacher wiping down desks no child will sit at, a class register zipped inside her coat where she can feel it against her ribs.
background: Taught the third grade at the community school and turned her classroom into a shelter for whoever the street sent her.
personality: Warm, unshakeably calm, and quietly relentless about keeping people together.
secret: She keeps the class register current and cannot bring herself to draw a line through the children who did not come back.
notes: T45 · The Terraces. Skill: teaching/morale (GDD teacher archetype). Hook: the register is a memorial-wall thread (Humanity system).
